questions.question: LeetCode #1 Two Sum: Given an integer array and a target, return indices of two different numbers that add to the target. Which data structure(s) can give an efficient solution?

LeetCode #3 Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters: Given a string, return the length of the longest substring with all unique characters. Which data structure(s) can give an efficient solution?
LeetCode #15 3Sum: Given an integer array, return all unique triplets [a,b,c] such that a+b+c=0. Which data structure(s) are part of an efficient solution?
LeetCode #42 Trapping Rain Water: Given non-negative bar heights, compute how much rainwater is trapped after raining. Which data structure(s) can give an efficient solution?

LeetCode #56 Merge Intervals: Given a list of intervals [start,end], merge all overlapping intervals and return non-overlapping intervals covering the same ranges. Which data structure(s) are used in an efficient solution?
LeetCode #102 Binary Tree Level Order Traversal: Given a binary tree root, return node values level by level from left to right. Which data structure is the key for an efficient solution?
LeetCode #200 Number of Islands: Given an m x n grid of '1' (land) and '0' (water), count how many connected islands there are. Which data structure(s) can give an efficient solution?
LeetCode #215 Kth Largest Element in an Array: Given an unsorted array and integer k, return the kth largest element (not kth distinct). Which data structure can give an efficient solution?
